meta.title: Cisco Cyber Vision: Cybersecurity for the Industrial Internet
meta.description:
With Cisco's recent acquisition of Sentryo, many were interested to hear Marc Blackmer of Cisco on the S4x20 Sponsor Stage. He went over the new Cyber Vision solution that incorporates the Sentryo solution into Cisco's network products.

Most importantly he makes the point (prediction) that collecting monitoring data via span ports is expensive and at best an interim solution.

The last four minutes show an example integration of Cyber Vision with the Cisco ISE offering.
